chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI. CP No.D-381 of 2018 ____________________________________________________________ Dated Order with signature of Judge. ____________________________________________________________ For hearing of main case. 30.09.2025. Mr. Abdul Karim Khan Fahim, Advocate for the Respondent No.2. Ms. Zahrah Sehr Vayani, DAG. Mr. Ghulam Akbar Lashari, Advocate for the SBCA --------------- No one is in attendance on behalf of the Petitioner and no intimation has been received. A perusal of the Order sheet reflects that the same has been pending since 2018 without having been pursued over a protracted period suggesting that the Petitioner has lost interest in the matter. The Petition stands dismissed accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE Hyder/PS
